title: Poove Semboove Lyrics Solla Thudikuthu Manasu
stanzas:
poovae semboovae
un vaasam varum
vaasal en vaasal
un poongaavanam
vaai paesidum pullaanguzhal
needhaanoru poovin madal

nizhal poala naanum
nizhal poala naanum
nadai poda neeyum
thodarginra sondham
nedungaala bandham

kadal vaanam kooda
niram maarak koodum
naan konda paasam
thadam maaridaadhu

naan vaazhum vaazhvae
unakkaagaththaanae
naal dhoarum nenjil
naan aendhum thaenae

ennaalum sangeedham
sandhoashame
vaay paesidum pullaanguzhal
needhaanoru poovin madal

unaipoala naanum
oru pillai dhaanae
palar vandhu konjum
kili pillai naanae

unaipoala naalum
malar soodum penmai
vidhi ennum noolil
vilaiyaadum bommai

naan seydha paavam
ennodu poagum
nee vaazhndhu nandhaan
paarththaalae podhum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

In which movie is this song featured?

The song is from the movie Solla Thudikuthu Manasu.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the renowned K.J. Yesudhas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in the year 1988.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poove Semboove, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and connection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song's soothing melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a time of pure affection. As K.J. Yesudhas's soulful voice fills the air, it encapsulates the essence of longing and devotion. This classic piece remains a beloved favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poove Semboove is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the legendary K.J. Yesudhas. The enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja elevates the song to a realm of nostalgia, making it a cherished classic. Dive into the lyrical beauty and emotional depth of this song that resonates with every romantic heart.
stanzaMeanings: Flower, beautiful flower, your fragrance comes to my door; your garden speaks through the flute, it is the flower's melody.
Flower, beautiful flower, your fragrance comes.
Like a shadow, I too walk like a shadow; you are the bond that connects us, stretching our relationship.
The sea and sky change colors; my love cannot be diminished.
I live my life for you; every day in my heart, I always keep you sweet like honey.
Still, music brings joy; the flute speaks, it is the flower's melody.
Like you, I am also a child; many come and call me a little bird.
Like you, I bloom like a flower; the fate of woman plays like a doll in the book of life.
The sin I committed will go with you; living well is enough if you just look at me.
The flute speaks, it is the flower's melody.
